chunks.title: Israel Defeated and the Ark Taken to Camp
chunks.reason: Describes the initial battle loss and the decision to bring the ark from Shiloh.

chunks.title: The Second Battle and Ark Captured
chunks.reason: Covers the Philistines' reaction to the ark's arrival, the second defeat, and the capture of the ark.

chunks.title: The Messenger Arrives at Shiloh
chunks.reason: Narrates the runner's arrival and Eli's death upon hearing the news.

chunks.title: Death of Phinehas's Wife and Naming of Ichabod
chunks.reason: Details the wife's death in childbirth and her naming of the son to signify the departure of glory.
